
[Lang Struvture from 2370](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Gw4oHBAlfsnRYtE9uBrUw5DOJKR-IEPPb9pZ5WYSNNM/edit?slide=id.g3b6ecc843ee_0_520#slide=id.g3b6ecc843ee_0_520)

[Lang & Brain from 413](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1qOe7Vi09HgL4BGI1IVWMpDqx-Ia6_wpq/edit?slide=id.p1#slide=id.p1)
